title: Adobe Acrobat Sign integration

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml:
What would be the best way to integrate with adobe acrobat sign, to save signed docs in a file column in monday.com?
I am currently trying with integromat/make.com, but I can’t seem to get the process right.
Can someone assist me with this?
Thanks in advance.
